name: Review Implementing
description: Systematically processes and implements code review feedback by parsing reviewer comments into discrete TodoWrite tasks, locating relevant code, making targeted changes with Edit/Write tools, running tests and linting, and reporting progress in real-time

findings_summary.notes: Prompt-only skill (SKILL.md only, no additional scripts or hooks). Well-structured workflow for implementing code review feedback: parse notes, create TodoWrite tasks, locate code with Grep/Glob, implement with Edit tool, verify with tests and ruff linting, report to user. References pytest conventions and PEP 604/585 type hints. Parent repo (mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace, HTML primary language, 406 stars) note: actual star count is 406 not 350 as recorded in metadata. Repo created 2025-10-17, last pushed 2026-01-15, Apache-2.0 license. CHANGELOG shows review-implementing was part of v1.0.0 initial release. repo has execution-runtime with sandbox.py (RestrictedPython sandboxing) but this skill does not use it. No attack surface for this SKILL.md-only skill.

scan_summary: SKILL.md only - no scripts, hooks, or executables. Structured code-review workflow that operates on user's local codebase. Stale star count in metadata (recorded 350, actual 406). No security concerns.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
